get.summary: Reveal the active auth mode (dev_header / jwt) — public, no PII.
Begin OIDC flow to the configured IdP. 503 when IdP is not configured.

OIDC authorization-code-flow callback. Exchanges `code` for the IdP's ID token, verifies it via OIDC_JWKS_URL, mints OUR session JWT (RS256), and redirects to the frontend with the token in the URL fragment.
Return the calling principal — orgId, userId, role + org slug/name for UI display.
Liveness probe
Readiness probe — DB + (when wired) Redis roundtrip
Public service status (fail-soft, cacheable)

post.description: Runs deterministic structured checks (coverage, modifiers, NCCI bundling, medical necessity, timely filing, COB, provider taxonomy, 42 CFR Part 2 SUD consent, MHPAEA parity) and returns citation-grounded findings per CARC class.
post.summary: Pre-flight a claim against payer × state × code rules
Upload a parsed 835 ERA file and persist it to denial intelligence
Parse an X12 271 eligibility response into a typed object
Generate an X12 270 eligibility inquiry
Generate an X12 837P professional claim
Generate an X12 837I institutional claim (UB-04)

get.summary: Top denial reasons (CARC) by dollar impact
Pre-flight catch rate over the window
Daily denial counts for trend chart
Consolidated denial summary for the dashboard — KPIs (total denials, $ impact, pre-flight catch rate) + top CARC buckets.
List alerts for the calling tenant
List the calling tenant's clearinghouse credentials (no plaintext)

put.summary: Upsert credentials for one clearinghouse. Plaintext is encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.

post.summary: Test credentials by minting an access token. Updates last_verified_at on success/failure.
Upload a CMS Final Rule (or MLN article / state Medicaid manual) PDF as base64 JSON. Persists the file + a source_document row; downstream extractor picks up new rows on its own.

get.summary: List recent Final Rules / regulatory uploads (limited to last 200)
List the calling tenant's client companies (id + display fields)
Search CPT/HCPCS codes by prefix.
Look up a single CPT/HCPCS code. CPT short_descriptors are gated by the AMA license token; HCPCS Level II flows through unchanged.
Pull next-priority unclaimed candidates

post.summary: Atomically claim a candidate (queued → claimed)
Accept candidate and insert payer_rule
Reject candidate
Accept with edits and insert edited payer_rule

get.summary: Search this tenant audit log (paginated, keyset)
Export the caller tenant's finalized rulebook history (JSON)
Export the caller tenant's audit-log rows over N days (NDJSON, streamed)
Export the caller tenant's denial event aggregates (CSV)
Look up the suppression status of an address

post.summary: Add an address to the global suppression list (admin override)
Bump the global synthesis-cache version (admin only)
Request deletion of the calling tenant (MSA § 7). 30-day grace.

get.summary: Read the calling tenant's current deletion request, if any

delete.summary: Cancel a pending deletion request (only requested/scheduled state)

post.summary: Scrub or remove a single audit_log row's payload. Records a hash + meta-audit row.

get.summary: List active overrides for the calling tenant

put.summary: Upsert an override for one scope

post.description: Behind feature flag synthesis.enabled. Uses Bedrock when synthesis.provider.name=bedrock and the SDK adapter is wired; otherwise falls back to the deterministic provider. Refusals (flag off, no findings, low confidence) return 422.
post.summary: Synthesize structured lookup findings into a brief plain-English narrative

get.summary: List SCIM bearer tokens for the calling tenant (no plaintext).

post.summary: Create a new SCIM bearer token. The plaintext is returned ONCE; store it now.
Create an ABN record (CMS-R-131)

get.summary: List ABN records for the calling tenant

post.summary: Render the CMS-R-131 form for an ABN record as a PDF

get.summary: Return privacy + AI notices applicable to a state

post.summary: Record a consent decision for a privacy notice
File a Data Subject Access/Deletion Request. 45-day clock starts at received_at.

get.summary: Tenant admin: list DSAR requests

patch.summary: Tenant admin: update a DSAR's status

post.summary: Run the PHI redactor over raw text without persisting (UX preview).
Persist a redacted-only copy of a document as a client_doc_upload. Original raw text is never stored. Returns the upload + redaction_event ids.
Open a new draft client_rulebook

get.summary: Compute diff between authoritative + this rulebook

post.summary: Record a per-row reconciliation decision
Finalize a draft rulebook; computes integrity_hash
Submit a "this rule is wrong" dispute
Analyst confirms our rule is correct
Analyst confirms our rule is wrong; spawns extraction_candidate
Create a webhook subscription for the caller tenant

get.summary: List webhook subscriptions for this tenant

post.summary: Pause a subscription
Resume a paused subscription

delete.summary: Disable a subscription (soft delete; deliveries already in flight finish or dead-letter)

get.summary: Look up CMS-HCC v28 + RxHCC mappings for a single ICD-10

post.description: Maps each ICD-10 to its V28 HCC, applies the hierarchy (more-severe HCC trumps less-severe), sums surviving raf_weights, and returns total + breakdown + unmapped ICDs. For Medicare Advantage capitation revenue analytics. RLS enforces tenant isolation on any tenant-scoped persistence layered on top.
post.summary: Compute CMS-HCC v28 Risk Adjustment Factor (RAF) for a list of ICD-10s
Stripe webhook receiver (HMAC-verified locally)

get.summary: Return the caller tenant's current entitlement (tier/seats/states/packs)
Convenience: 302-redirect to a freshly minted Stripe customer-portal session. Frontend uses this as a plain <a href> from the billing page.
Banner state for the in-app dunning UI

post.summary: Create a Stripe Checkout session for self-serve tier purchase
Create a Stripe Customer Portal session for the calling tenant
Self-serve seat increase (writes through Stripe with prorations)
SNS-delivered SES bounce/complaint feedback

get.summary: Redeem an unsubscribe token (browser-friendly GET)

post.summary: Redeem an unsubscribe token (RFC 8058 List-Unsubscribe POST)
Issue a magic-link invite for an existing app_user

get.summary: List recent invites for the calling tenant

post.summary: Redeem a magic-link invite. Anonymous + rate-limited.
Start a self-serve signup. Returns a Stripe Checkout URL.

info.title: Billing Rules Platform API
info.description: Pre-flight a claim against payer × state × code rules.

code.description: CPT or HCPCS Level II code

client_id.description: Tenant client_id; required if SUD codes appear on the claim.

patient_external_id.description: De-identified patient reference, used for 42 CFR Part 2 SUD consent lookup.
